title: ClinicalTrials.gov v2 ingester (+ PII drop, hash, version capture)
context: The pilot pipeline begins with a reproducible ingester for ClinicalTrials.gov API v2, the primary source. It pulls Ewing/pediatric-sarcoma trial records, drops investigator/contact PII at ingest, and captures registry version + retrieval timestamp + a source-text hash for drift detection. Registry records are about trials, not patients; only open registries are used.
objective: Build a ClinicalTrials.gov API v2 ingester that queries by condition (Ewing family) and gene (EWSR1), stores raw records with registry/version/retrievedAt, drops contact PII, and hashes verbatim eligibility spans.
acceptanceCriteria: Ingests trial records via ClinicalTrials.gov API v2 queried by condition (Ewing sarcoma / PNET / Askin / Ewing family) and by gene (EWSR1).
Stores the raw record with registry, registryVersion, and retrievedAt timestamp.
Drops investigator/contact PII (names, emails, phone) at ingest; redaction enforced.
Computes a SHA-256 hash of each verbatim eligibility source span for drift detection.
Respects API rate limits and Terms of Use; no secrets or keys written to logs.
